name: SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance
title: SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance
syntax: dword SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance( dword aepHandle, dword serviceId, dword instanceId ); // form 1
description: This function creates a Provided Service Instance and adds it to an Application Endpoint which was created by SomeIpReleaseProvidedServiceInstance.
Objects can be assigned to the Service Instance as follows:
The Service Instance can be deleted again with SomeIpReleaseProvidedServiceInstance.

parameters.name: aepHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Application Endpoint (see SomeIpOpenLocalApplicationEndpoint)

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the SomeIpGetLastError function.
